𝗩𝗢𝗜𝗗𝗔𝗨𝗧𝗛 | To provide a centralized, secure, and user-friendly Single Sign-On (SSO) solution for managing access to multiple self-hosted applications.  🔥 Super Hot!

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a centralized, secure, and user-friendly Single Sign-On (SSO) solution for managing access to multiple self-hosted applications.
📅 Created: Apr 2025 • Updated: Feb 2026

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ OpenID Connect (OIDC) Provider
✅ Proxy ForwardAuth
✅ User and Groups Management
✅ User Self-Registration and Invitations
✅ Customizable UI and Email Templates
✅ Multi-factor Authentication, Passkeys, and Passkey-Only Accounts
✅ Secure Password Reset with Email Verification
✅ Encryption-At-Rest with Postgres or SQLite Database


⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 57 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 26 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

VoidAuth is an open-source Single Sign-On (SSO) solution designed for self-hosted applications. It acts as a central authentication provider using OpenID Connect (OIDC) and Proxy ForwardAuth, simplifying user management and enhancing security for a personal digital universe.

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/voidauth/voidauth

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗟𝗢𝗗𝗘𝗦𝗧𝗢𝗡𝗘 | Simplifying the setup and management of multiplayer game servers, particularly Minecraft, through an accessible graphical interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Simplifying the setup and management of multiplayer game servers, particularly Minecraft, through an accessible graphical interface.
📅 Created: Apr 2022 • Updated: Feb 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Clean and intuitive UI
✅ One-click installation and setup
✅ Real-time server status
✅ File manager (unzip, upload, download, copy, paste)
✅ Collaborative remote server and resource management
✅ User permission management
✅ Extensions via macro
✅ Playit.gg integration for port-forward-free connections
✅ Docker container management (WIP)


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 51 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 91 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Lodestone is a free, open-source server hosting tool for Minecraft and other multiplayer games, built with Rust, React, and TypeScript. It offers a user-friendly interface for easy setup, real-time status monitoring, file management, and collaborative server administration, with a focus on security and extensibility.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Lodestone-Team/lodestone
